# Kiongozi Platform, Database Map

---

## 1. System overview

Two Supabase projects, eight consumer apps. **Never drop a shared-DB table based on one app alone.**

| Database | Project ID | Tables | Consumer apps |
|---|---|---|---|
| Shared ("Kiongozi Platform") | `jdncfyagppohtksogzkx` | 96 | LMS · api-server · admin · mobile · moderator · chatbot-web · kiongozi-tools |
| Landing ("Kiongozi_Opportunities") | `nttpjaedqhzhpwecprtr` | 4 | Landing page |

### Consumer app registry

| Key | Name | Repo path | Stack | DB access |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `lms` | Kiongozi LMS | `Kiongozi-LMS` (submodule) | Next.js | Supabase JS (anon + service) |
| `api` | api-server | `api-server` | Node/Express | Supabase JS (service role) |
| `admin` | Admin Dashboard | `admin` | Next.js | anon key + server routes |
| `mobile` | Mobile App | `kiongozi-mobile-working` | Expo/RN | api-server REST + direct Supabase |
| `mod` | Moderator Dashboard | `kiongozi-moderator-dashboard` | Next.js | Supabase JS |
| `chatbot` | Chatbot Web | repo root | Next.js | mostly via api-server; direct: profiles |
| `tools` | kiongozi-tools | `kiongozi-tools/backend` | Python FastAPI | Supabase Python (service role) |
| `landing` | Landing Page | `kiongozi-platform-v1` | Next.js | Supabase JS (separate project) |

---

Each ✓ means that app queries at least one table in this domain.

## 3. Shared DB, table directory (96 tables)

Legend: RLS ✓ = enabled · ✗ = **DISABLED (security risk)** · Apps = which apps query this table

### 3.1 Platform (13 tables)

| Table | Cols | RLS | Key FKs (ON DELETE) | Apps |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `profiles` | 31 | ✓ | → auth.users | lms, api, admin, mobile, mod, chatbot |
| `notifications` | 11 | ✓ | user_id → profiles (CASCADE) | lms, api, mobile |
| `user_badges` | 4 | ✓ | user_id → profiles (CASCADE), badge_id → badges (CASCADE) | lms, api |
| `badges` | 9 | ✓ |, | lms, api |
| `user_login_logs` | 6 | ✓ | user_id → profiles (CASCADE) | lms, api |
| `user_search_history` | 7 | ✓ | user_id → profiles (CASCADE) | api |
| `user_activities` | 8 | ✓ | user_id → profiles (CASCADE), conversation_id → conversations (NO ACTION) | api |
| `push_tokens` | 5 | ✓ | user_id → profiles (CASCADE) | mobile, api |
| `system_logs` | 13 | ✓ | user_id → profiles (NO ACTION), resolved_by → profiles (NO ACTION), conversation_id → conversations (NO ACTION) | api, admin |
| `system_settings` | 13 | ✓ | updated_by → profiles (NO ACTION) | api, admin |
| `reports` | 8 | ✓ | reporter_id → profiles (RESTRICT), reported_user_id → profiles (CASCADE), reported_post_id → posts (CASCADE) | api, mobile |
| `admin_actions` | 6 | ✓ | admin_id → profiles (CASCADE), target_user_id → profiles (CASCADE) | admin |
| `impact_points` | 9 | ✓ | user_id → profiles (CASCADE) | api |

### 3.10 Accountability, kiongozi-tools (3 tables)

> **Note:** All three tables have RLS **disabled**. The Python backend uses the service role key (bypasses RLS). Enabling RLS is safe, see remediation script Tier 2.1.

| Table | Cols | RLS | Key FKs | Apps |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `welfare_funds` | 9 | **✗ DISABLED** |, | tools |
| `youth_inputs` | 9 | **✗ DISABLED** |, | tools |
| `fund_alerts` | 7 | **✗ DISABLED** | fund_id → welfare_funds (CASCADE) | tools |

## 4. Orphaned / deprecated tables (candidates for removal)

Confirmed zero references across all eight consumer apps:

| Table | Reason |
|---|---|
| `quiz_answer_options` | Superseded by `quiz_options`; `quiz_user_answers` still FK-references it, drop both together |
| `quiz_user_answers` | Superseded by `quiz_attempts`; references orphaned `quiz_answer_options` |
| `discussion_threads` | Was replaced by `social_posts` / `social_comments` in the LMS civic feature rewrite |
| `discussion_replies` | Same, no app queries it |
| `discussion_votes` | Same |
| `review_helpful_votes` | No query found in any app (only 1 FK to profiles) |
| `user_notes` | Defined and FK-connected but never queried by any consumer |
| `course_tags` | Was referenced only by the now-removed landing `/api/courses` route |
| `course_tag_mappings` | Same, drop after confirming `course_tags` is safe to remove |

**Action:** Back up data, then drop via Tier 3 of `supabase/migrations/20260619000000_audit_remediation.sql`.

---

## 5. Landing DB, table directory (4 tables)

Project `nttpjaedqhzhpwecprtr` ("Kiongozi_Opportunities"). Used only by `kiongozi-platform-v1`.

| Table | Cols | RLS | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `opportunities` | 9 | ✓ | ⚠️ Overly-permissive INSERT/UPDATE policies (public write), fix in `supabase_audit_remediation.sql` |
| `events` | 14 | ✓ | |
| `bursaries` | 9 | ✓ | |
| `platform_configs` | 5 | ✓ | |

`blog_posts` table needed by `/updates` and `/admin/posts` routes but **never created**, `supabase_audit_remediation.sql` FIX 1 creates it.

---

## 6. Key FK relationship chains

```
auth.users
  └─ profiles (id)
       ├─ courses (author_id) ──── course_modules ──── learning_modules
       │                      └─ course_enrollments, course_reviews, quizzes
       ├─ conversations (user_id) ── messages ── message_analytics
       │                         └─ chat_sessions
       ├─ posts (user_id) ── post_likes, post_media, post_hashtags
       │                 └─ mentions, bookmarks, reports
       ├─ dm_conversations ← dm_participants ← dm_messages
       ├─ user_progress (module_id → learning_modules)
       ├─ social_petitions ← social_petition_signatures
       └─ public_funds ← fund_allocations, fund_disbursements
                      └─ public_projects ← project_updates ← project_media

welfare_funds (RLS off)
  └─ fund_alerts (RLS off)
```

---

## 7. Security snapshot

| Status | Finding | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| 🔴 RLS DISABLED | `welfare_funds`, `youth_inputs`, `fund_alerts` | Tier 2.1, safe (tools uses service role) |
| 🔴 PUBLIC WRITE | `opportunities` INSERT/UPDATE allows anon | `supabase_audit_remediation.sql` FIX 2 |
| 🟠 ALWAYS-TRUE POLICY | `notifications` INSERT, `dm_conversations` INSERT | Tier 2.5 of remediation script |
| 🟠 SEARCH PATH | 57 SECURITY DEFINER functions have mutable search_path | Tier 2.4 |

---

## 8. How to update this file

### Manual refresh (local)
```bash
cd Kiongozi-LMS
export SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=your_pat_here   # supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens
node scripts/generate-db-map.mjs
```

### Automatic (CI)
The GitHub Action `.github/workflows/update-db-map.yml` triggers on any push to `main` that touches migration files. It runs `generate-db-map.mjs` and commits the result.

Required GitHub secret: `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN` (a Supabase Personal Access Token with read access to both projects).

### App ownership config
The `scripts/db-map-config.json` file controls which tables belong to which domain and which apps query them. Update it when you add a new consumer app or refactor table ownership, then re-run the script.
